purpose: Provides uniform temperature control across multiple zones for wafer processing, maintaining precise thermal conditions for deposition quality

states.name: heating_element_resistance
states.description: Electrical resistance of heating elements, increases with thermal cycling

states.name: element_degradation_level
states.description: Health factor from thermal cycling and chemical exposure, 1.0 = healthy, 0.0 = failed

events.name: electrical_bridge_formation
events.description: vapours form condensates from salts or oxides creating electrical bridges

events.name: power_terminal_fracture
events.description: stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld

parameters.name: nominal_zone_temperature
parameters.description: Target operating temperature for heating zones

parameters.name: nominal_safe_temperature
parameters.description: Target safe temperature for monitoring point

parameters.name: resistance_increase_rate
parameters.description: Rate of resistance increase due to thermal cycling

parameters.name: thermal_stress_factor
parameters.description: Multiplier for degradation rate based on operating conditions

parameters.name: temperature_resistance_coefficient
parameters.description: Temperature change per ohm of resistance change

parameters.name: element_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Degradation level below which element fails

parameters.name: bridge_resistance_threshold
parameters.description: Resistance level above which electrical bridging occurs

parameters.name: fracture_threshold
parameters.description: Degradation level below which terminal fracture occurs

state_transition_logic: heating_element_resistance increases by resistance_increase_rate * dt, clamped to [8.0, 15.0]
element_degradation_level decreases by (1.0 / thermal_cycling_hours) * thermal_stress_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
assumptions: All heating zones degrade uniformly and have identical characteristics
Resistance increase is primarily due to thermal cycling effects
Temperature output decreases as resistance increases and degradation progresses
Safe temperature monitoring point is not directly affected by heating element degradation
Thermal stress factor remains constant during operation
